name: Binding Drift in Multi-Step Tool-Augmented Agents
summary: arXiv:2607.18316v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Tool-augmented language-model agents execute multi-step workflows over external systems, resolving an entity once and then acting on it across subs...
description: arXiv:2607.18316v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Tool-augmented language-model agents execute multi-step workflows over external systems, resolving an entity once and then acting on it across subsequent steps. Prior work shows that in single-step actions, agents select the correct tool but bind it to the wrong entity 24-26% of the time. We study what happens to entity bindings over time: do th...
author: Rahul Suresh Babu, Shashank Indukuri
